title: This 25-Year-Old Built a 2-Year Moat Nobody Can Bet Against | Corgi, Nico Laqua & Emily Yuan
summary: Corgi, an insurtech startup founded by Nico Laqua and Emily Yuan, raised a $108M Series A by rebuilding the insurance industry from first principles rather than modernizing legacy systems. The founders emphasize pursuing ambitious goals and executing relentlessly despite regulatory obstacles, creating a durable competitive moat through sustained effort and fresh perspective.
